e-Brochure i20 Knight. Born head-turner There are cars, and then, there is the i20 Knight. Sleek, black, mystical. A stylish way to stand out among the ordinary. Designed to turn heads with its uber cool looks, blacked-out elements, and exclusive badging. i20 Knight. Born head-turner There are cars, and then, there is the i20 Knight. Sleek, black, mystical. A stylish way to stand out among the ordinary. Designed to turn heads with its uber cool looks, blacked-out elements, and exclusive badging. All black interiors with brass colored inserts The Hyundai i20 Knight Edition features luxurious all-black interiors, highlighted by elegant brass-coloured inserts, combining sophistication and sportiness to offer a premium feel that enhances the cabin ambience and makes every journey comfortable and stylish. Black seat upholstery Premium black seat upholstery delivers comfort and elegance while providing excellent support, complementing the sporty interiors and creating a cohesive cabin look that elevates both the style and driving experience. Sporty Metal pedals Metal pedals add a sporty, stylish touch to the cabin, enhancing driving control while creating a visually appealing interior that ensures every journey feels dynamic, exciting, and premium. banner R16 Diamond cut Black alloy wheels with red brake calipers R16 diamond-cut black alloy wheels combined with striking red brake callipers give the i20 a bold, sporty stance, creating a head-turning appearance while reflecting the vehicleâs dynamic character and style. Knight Emblem The exclusive Knight emblem signifies the Hyundai i20 Knight Edition's unique identity, emphasising individuality and style, making it instantly recognisable and adding a premium, distinctive character to the vehicleâs exterior. Black painted skid plates Black-painted skid plates enhance the rugged, sporty look of the Hyundai i20 Knight Edition while protecting against minor impacts, adding a robust, stylish touch to both the front and rear sections. banner Hyundai i20 - Attract Attention. The new Hyundai i20 captures attention wherever it goes. A mesmerising new grille, resplendent DRLs and tail lamps make it a sight to behold. Its magnetic personality is sure to attract minds and hearts alike. banner Wireless charger Soothing blue ambient lighting Front Wireless charger The new Hyundai i20 comes with the convenience of wireless phone charging so that your phone never runs out of battery while travelling. Front Soothing blue ambient lighting Blue ambient lighting complements the luxurious and sophisticated interior. Ambient lighting elevate your senses to a new high Dashcam The built-in dashcam records every journey in high clarity, providing enhanced safety, security, and peace of mind while driving, helping capture important moments and assisting drivers in critical situations. Sporty tailgate spoiler with side wings The tailgate spoiler with side wings enhances aerodynamics and adds a sporty exterior aesthetic, giving the i20 a striking, dynamic presence while improving stability and performance during every drive. Voice enabled smart electric sunroof The smart electric sunroof can be operated effortlessly with voice commands, combining convenience, comfort, and luxury while allowing fresh air and sunlight to enter the cabin for an enjoyable driving experience. 26.03 cm HD touchscreen infotainment & navigation system (Best in segment) The 26.03 cm HD touchscreen infotainment and navigation system provides seamless connectivity, intuitive controls, and accurate navigation, keeping drivers informed, entertained, and connected throughout every journey in a user-friendly manner. Bose premium 7 speaker system The Bose premium 7-speaker audio system delivers immersive, crystal-clear sound throughout the cabin, enhancing every journey with high-quality music, creating a rich audio experience for all passengers in the i20. banner Explore i20 - 3D configurator Gallery 1/5 next prev Download Exterior Disclaimer: Hyundai Motor India reserves the right to change specifications, colour, equipment and schemes at any time without prior notice Request a Test Drive Error! How many models are there in i20? The Hyundai i20 offers 9 distinct models: Era, Magna, ExecutiveMagna, MagnaSportz, Sportz(O), Sportz(O) Knight, Asta, Asta(O), and Asta(O) Knight. These cater to a range of preferences, from base to premium trims. Q2. Which colour options are available for the i20? The Hyundai i20 offers 7 colours: Amazon Grey, Abyss Black - Knight, Fiery Red, Atlas White, Atlas White with Abyss Black, Starry Night, and Titan Grey. These options enhance its stylish appeal across models. Q3. How many years has i20 been in the Indian market? Launched in 2008, the Hyundai i20 has been a staple in the Indian automotive market for 17 years as of 2025. This premium hatchback remains popular for its reliable performance, comfort, and updated design and technology, making it a top choice for buyers seeking advanced features and style. Q4. What standout grille design does the i20 feature? The Hyundai i20 features a parametric jewel grille pattern, enhancing its sporty, sophisticated look. The grille design integrates seamlessly with Z-shaped LED tail lamps and stylish headlamps, giving the i20 a unique identity that stands out in the premium hatchback segment. Q5. What size and style of alloy wheels come with the i20? Depending on the variant, i20 comes with R16 diamond-cut alloy wheels, styled steel wheels, or black-painted alloy wheels with red brake callipers in the Knight edition. These wheels combine aesthetics with functionality, offering improved grip and a sporty stance that complements the carâs overall design. Do check out! The new Hyundai EXTER Drive to shine.
